content.situation: 员工在办公室领取办公用品时，主管示意需要先签字确认申领单。
content.speakerText: Could you sign here before I give you the supplies?
content.speakerTextCn: 在我把用品给你之前，你能在这儿签个字吗？

options: Where should I put my name?

content.hint: 当对方要求你签字时，用肯定且及时的回应表达配合态度。
content.knowledgePoint: 表达配合与即时行动的礼貌回应

content.situation: 行政人员递给员工一份申领表，说：'All set—just need your signature to process this.'
content.speakerText: All set—just need your signature to process this.
content.speakerTextCn: 都准备好了，只需要你的签名来处理这个。

options: Can you just approve it for me?

content.hint: 确认已完成动作时，简洁表达‘已签’是最自然的回应方式。
content.knowledgePoint: 简洁确认已完成动作的口语表达

content.situation: 同事在你签字后递回表格，并说：'Thanks for signing so quickly!'
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你这么快就签好了！

options: I had nothing else to do.
You're welcome, but I didn't do much.
It's not a big deal, really.

content.hint: 当别人感谢你配合流程时，用积极、礼貌的短语回应以维持良好工作氛围。
content.knowledgePoint: 回应感谢的自然职场表达
